title: Add BigramHash module: lightweight n-gram logit bias via hash embedding
author: tigertonez

data.description: Injects shallow bigram statistics into model logits via a learned hash embedding table as a logit bias

novel_contributions: Introduction of BigramHash module to add shallow bigram statistics as logit bias
Use of Knuth multiplicative hash to map bigrams to a compact embedding table
Zero-initialized embedding table to start as no-op and learn incrementally
Achieving a lightweight n-gram prior at near-zero parameter cost
Aggressive int4 quantization to fit the added parameters within artifact budget (~16MB)
